prompt: Create a sales dashboard in a single HTML file. Display 4 stat cards at the top: Total Revenue ($45,230), Orders (342), Customers (156), Conversion Rate (3.2%). Below, a simple bar chart using colored div bars showing monthly sales for Jan-Jun (values: 5200, 6800, 4900, 7200, 8100, 6500). Include a table below with top 5 products (name, units sold, revenue). Clean white design with blue accent.

test_cases.name: The four KPI cards expose exact prompt values for revenue, orders, customers, and conversion rate

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').toLowerCase(); return /45,?230/.test(t) && /342/.test(t) && /156/.test(t) && /3\.2%/.test(t);})()

test_cases.name: Four stat cards show the exact prompt values without zero placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>20&&r.height>10;};const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const blocks=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,div,li')].filter(visible).map(el=>norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')).filter(t=>t.length>0&&t.length<600);const hasPair=(label,rx)=>blocks.some(t=>new RegExp(label,'i').test(t)&&rx.test(t));return hasPair('total\\s+revenue|revenue',/\$?\s*45,?230\b/)&&hasPair('orders?',/\b342\b/)&&hasPair('customers?',/\b156\b/)&&hasPair('conversion',/\b3\.2\s*%/)&&!blocks.some(t=>/(total\s+revenue|orders?|customers?|conversion)/i.test(t)&&/\$\s*0\b|\b0%\b|:\s*0\b/.test(t));})()

test_cases.name: Monthly Jan-Jun sales use six visible colored div bars with value-scaled heights

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=="none"&&s.visibility!=="hidden"&&parseFloat(s.opacity||"1")>0&&r.width>=4&&r.height>=8;};function norm(s){return (s||"").toString().replace(/\s+/g," ").trim();}const months=["jan","feb","mar","apr","may","jun"];const values=["5200","6800","4900","7200","8100","6500"];function hasDigit(s){return (s||"").toString().split("").some(ch=>ch>="0"&&ch<="9");}const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll("section,article,main,div")].filter(visible).map(el=>{return {el:el,text:norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||"")};}).filter(x=>{const low=x.text.toLowerCase();return x.text.length<3000&&(months.every(m=>low.includes(m))||low.includes("monthly sales")||low.includes("sales performance"));}).sort((a,b)=>a.text.length-b.text.length);for(const obj of sections){const el=obj.el;const bars=[...el.querySelectorAll("div")].filter(d=>visible(d)).map(d=>{const r=d.getBoundingClientRect();const meta=norm([d.getAttribute("aria-label"),d.getAttribute("title"),d.getAttribute("data-value"),d.style.height,d.className,d.textContent].join(" "));const bg=getComputedStyle(d).backgroundColor.toLowerCase();return {w:r.width,h:r.height,meta:meta,low:meta.toLowerCase(),bg:bg};}).filter(x=>(x.low.includes("bar")||x.low.includes("height")||x.low.includes("%")||hasDigit(x.meta))&&x.h>12&&x.w>3);if(bars.length<6)continue;const labels=[...el.querySelectorAll("*")].filter(visible).map(n=>norm(n.innerText||n.textContent||"").toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean);if(!months.every(m=>labels.some(t=>t===m||t.includes(m))))continue;const text=el.innerText||el.textContent||"";const compact=text.replaceAll(",","");const numericHits=values.filter(v=>compact.includes(v)).length;const hs=bars.slice(0,12).map(x=>x.h);const variation=Math.max(...hs)-Math.min(...hs);const hasColored=bars.some(x=>!x.bg.includes("255, 255, 255")&&!x.bg.includes("transparent"));const metaText=bars.map(x=>x.meta.replaceAll(",","")).join(" ");const hasKeyValues=metaText.includes("5200")||metaText.includes("8100");if(variation>=20&&hasColored&&(numericHits>=3||hasKeyValues))return true;}return false;})()

prompt: Build an IoT smart home dashboard in one HTML file. Floor plan view (SVG drawing of a house with rooms). Each room shows: temperature sensor reading, light status (on/off toggle), humidity. Sidebar: device list (8 devices: thermostat, 3 lights, 2 cameras, doorbell, smart lock) with status indicators. Click a device to toggle its state (visual feedback: green=on, gray=off). Real-time simulation: temperatures fluctuate +-0.5 every 5 seconds. Alert banner when temperature exceeds 28C. Energy usage chart (24-hour bar chart). Controls: master 'All Lights Off' button, temperature threshold slider. Dark theme with cyan accent. Store device states in localStorage.

test_cases.name: Device list
Smart-home sensors, device list, controls, and floor-plan surface are present

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=((document.body.innerText||'')+' '+(document.documentElement.innerHTML||'')).toLowerCase();const sensor=(/temperature|temp|°c|℃/.test(t)&&/humidity|%/.test(t)&&/light|on|off/.test(t));const devices=[/thermostat/,/light/,/camera/,/doorbell/,/lock/].filter(rx=>rx.test(t)).length;const controls=[/all lights off/,/threshold|slider/,/energy|24[- ]?hour|chart/,/alert|28/.test(t)].filter(Boolean).length;const floor=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg rect,svg text,canvas').length>=8;return sensor&&devices>=5&&controls>=3&&floor;})()

prompt: Create a social media data analysis dashboard, single HTML file. Multi-platform comparison: Weibo/Douyin/Xiaohongshu (switchable via Tab). Each platform displays: follower count, engagement rate, weekly growth, post count. Interactive timeline chart (SVG, 30-day data points, mouse hover to display specific value tooltip). Top posts ranking (5 items, including title/likes/comments/shares count). Audience profile: gender pie chart, age group bar chart, top 5 regions. Export button in top-right corner (click to generate JSON download). Real-time simulation: follower count randomly +1-5 every 10 seconds. Gradient purple theme.

prompt: Create a daily water intake tracker in one HTML file. A large circular progress indicator showing current intake vs goal (default 8 glasses). Plus/minus buttons to add or remove a glass. Display current count and goal. History section showing last 7 days as small colored dots (green if goal met, gray if not). Data saved in localStorage. Reset button for new day. Blue theme with wave animation at the bottom of the progress circle.

Tracker keeps count, goal, and 7-day history markers together

(()=>{const parse=(v)=>{try{return JSON.parse(v)}catch(e){return v}};const isObj=(x)=>!!x&&typeof x==='object'&&!Array.isArray(x);const roots=[];for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){roots.push(parse(localStorage.getItem(localStorage.key(i))));}const read=(obj,names)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return undefined;for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){const low=String(k).toLowerCase();if(names.includes(low))return obj[k];}return undefined;};const num=(v)=>{if(typeof v==='number')return v;if(typeof v==='string'&&v.trim()!==''&&!Number.isNaN(Number(v)))return Number(v);return NaN;};const hasDate=(obj)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return false;for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){const low=String(k).toLowerCase();if((low.includes('date')||low.includes('day'))&&String(obj[k]).length>=6)return true;}return false;};const hasMet=(obj)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return false;for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){const low=String(k).toLowerCase();if(low==='met'||low==='goalmet'||low==='complete'||low==='completed'||low==='achieved'||low==='done'||low.includes('met')||low.includes('achiev')||low.includes('complete')){const v=obj[k];if(typeof v==='boolean')return true;const s=String(v).toLowerCase();if(s==='true'||s==='false')return true;}}return false;};const okState=(obj)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return false;const current=num(read(obj,['current','count','intake','glasses','cups']));const goal=num(read(obj,['goal','dailygoal','target']));const history=read(obj,['history','days','records','log']);if(!(current===1&&goal===8&&Array.isArray(history)&&history.length>=1))return false;return history.some(day=>hasDate(day)&&hasMet(day));};const walk=(x,depth)=>{if(depth>4)return false;if(okState(x))return true;if(Array.isArray(x))return x.some(y=>walk(y,depth+1));if(isObj(x))return Object.values(x).some(y=>walk(y,depth+1));return false;};return roots.some(x=>walk(x,0));})()

Added expense appears in the transaction list, updates totals, and persists

steps.expression: (async()=>{const fire=(el,t)=>el&&el.dispatchEvent(new Event(t,{bubbles:true}));try{localStorage.clear();}catch(e){}const visible=e=>!!e&&e.offsetParent!==null;const text=()=>document.body.innerText.toLowerCase();const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')].filter(visible);const meta=e=>((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.parentElement?.innerText||'')).toLowerCase();const amount=fields.find(e=>e.type==='number'||/amount|金额|cost|price/.test(meta(e)));if(!amount)return false;amount.value='37.42';fire(amount,'input');fire(amount,'change');const desc=fields.find(e=>(e.tagName==='TEXTAREA'||e.type==='text'||!e.type)&&e!==amount&&!/date/.test(meta(e)));if(desc){desc.value='probe-expense-zeta';fire(desc,'input');fire(desc,'change');}const sel=fields.find(e=>e.tagName==='SELECT');if(sel){const opt=[...sel.options].find(o=>/food/i.test(o.textContent||''))||sel.options[1];if(opt)sel.value=opt.value;fire(sel,'input');fire(sel,'change');}const date=fields.find(e=>e.type==='date'||/date/.test(meta(e)));if(date){date.value='2026-04-26';fire(date,'input');fire(date,'change');}const before=text();const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=button],input[type=submit]')].filter(visible).find(b=>/add|save|添加|新增|记录/i.test(b.textContent||b.value||''));if(!btn)return false;btn.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600));const body=text();const stored=(()=>{try{return JSON.stringify(localStorage).toLowerCase();}catch(e){return '';}})();return body!==before&&body.includes('probe-expense-zeta')&&body.includes('37.42')&&/food|total|spent|合计|总/.test(body)&&(stored.includes('probe-expense-zeta')||stored.includes('37.42'));})()

prompt: Build a comprehensive workout tracker in one HTML file. Log workouts: exercise name, sets x reps x weight, date, notes. Pre-built exercise library dropdown (Bench Press, Squat, Deadlift, OHP, Pull-ups, etc.). Each workout session groups multiple exercises. View: workout history calendar (click date to see that day's workout), personal records table (max weight per exercise), volume chart (total weekly volume over 4 weeks using SVG bars), body measurement log (weight, body fat %). Statistics: total workouts this month, total volume, favorite exercise. Export data as JSON. Dark theme. All data in localStorage. Search/filter exercises.

prompt: Create a sleep tracking analyzer, single HTML file. Record: bedtime, wake-up time (two time pickers), sleep quality rating (1-5 stars), notes. Automatically calculate sleep duration. Display: weekly sleep duration bar chart (SVG, 7 days), average bedtime, average wake-up time, average sleep duration, average quality. Monthly trend: 30-day sleep quality line chart (mouse hover to view date and value). Sleep suggestions: provide improvement suggestions based on average duration (prompt insufficient if less than 7 hours). Data stored in localStorage. Support editing and deleting history records. Export CSV function. Deep blue sleep-aid theme.

steps.expression: (async()=>{const visible=e=>e&&getComputedStyle(e).display!=='none'&&getComputedStyle(e).visibility!=='hidden';const set=(el,val)=>{el.value=val;el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));};const times=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=time]')].filter(visible);if(times.length<2)return false;set(times[0],'23:00');set(times[1],'06:30');const ranges=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]')].filter(visible);if(ranges[0])set(ranges[0],'4');const ta=document.querySelector('textarea');if(ta)set(ta,'probe sleep note');const before=document.body.innerText;const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],input[type=submit]')].find(e=>/save|add|record|记录|添加/i.test((e.innerText||e.value||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')));if(!btn)return false;btn.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,700));const after=document.body.innerText;const combined=(after+' '+JSON.stringify({...localStorage})).toLowerCase();return after!==before&&/7\.5|7:30|7h\s*30|7\.50|7 hours|avg duration|average duration|sleep/.test(combined)&&/23:00|06:30|probe sleep/.test(combined);})()

prompt: Create a travel itinerary planner, single HTML file. Add itinerary: date, time, location, activity content, transportation method (dropdown: walk/subway/taxi/plane). Totals: number of days, activity count, estimated transportation time. Export as text (click button to copy to clipboard). Data stored in localStorage.

Creating an itinerary preserves date, time, location, activity, and transport in timeline or storage

steps.expression: async()=>{const wait=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&Number(s.opacity||1)>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const label=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.placeholder||el.title||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(el.name||'')+' '+(el.id||'')+' '+(el.className||'')).toLowerCase();const setVal=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();if(el.tagName==='SELECT'){const opt=[...el.options].find(o=>/subway|taxi|walk|plane/i.test(o.textContent||o.value))||el.options[1];if(opt)el.value=opt.value;}else if(el.isContentEditable){el.textContent=val;}else{el.value=val;}el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,select,textarea,[contenteditable=true]')].filter(visible);const date=fields.find(e=>e.type==='date'||/date/.test(label(e)));const time=fields.find(e=>e.type==='time'||/time/.test(label(e)));const loc=fields.find(e=>/location|place|destination/.test(label(e)));const act=fields.find(e=>/activity|content|details|note/.test(label(e)))||fields.find(e=>e.tagName==='TEXTAREA');const sel=fields.find(e=>e.tagName==='SELECT'||/transport/.test(label(e)));const before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');const ok=[setVal(date,'2026-05-20'),setVal(time,'09:30'),setVal(loc,'Kyoto Station'),setVal(act,'Temple walk'),setVal(sel,'subway')].filter(Boolean).length>=4;const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],input[type=submit],a')].filter(visible).find(e=>/add|create|save|itinerary/i.test(label(e)));if(btn)btn.click();await wait(600);const after=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');let stored='';try{stored=Object.values(localStorage).join(' ');}catch(e){}return ok&&(/Kyoto Station|Temple walk|09:30|2026/.test(after+stored))&&after!==before;}

Creating an itinerary writes date, time, location, activity, and transport into the timeline

steps.expression: (async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const meta=el=>[(el.placeholder||''),(el.name||''),(el.id||''),(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''),...(el.labels?[...el.labels].map(l=>l.innerText||''):[])].join(' ').toLowerCase();const fill=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();el.value=String(val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const location='Kyoto Station';const activity='Temple walk';const date='2026-05-02';const time='14:00';const before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')].filter(visible);const textInputs=fields.filter(el=>!['date','time','hidden','checkbox','radio','submit','button'].includes((el.type||'text').toLowerCase()));const dateInput=fields.find(el=>(el.type||'').toLowerCase()==='date')||textInputs.find(el=>/date|day/.test(meta(el)));const timeInput=fields.find(el=>(el.type||'').toLowerCase()==='time')||textInputs.find(el=>/time|hour/.test(meta(el)));const locationInput=textInputs.find(el=>/location|place|destination|where/.test(meta(el)))||textInputs[0];const activityInput=textInputs.find(el=>/activity|content|title|plan|event|todo|description/.test(meta(el))&&el!==locationInput)||fields.find(el=>el.tagName==='TEXTAREA')||textInputs[1];const ok=fill(dateInput,date)&&fill(timeInput,time)&&fill(locationInput,location)&&fill(activityInput,activity);const transportSelect=fields.find(el=>el.tagName==='SELECT'&&/transport|method|travel/.test(meta(el)))||fields.find(el=>el.tagName==='SELECT');if(transportSelect){const opt=[...transportSelect.options].find(o=>/taxi/i.test(o.textContent||o.value))||[...transportSelect.options].find(o=>/walk|subway|plane/i.test(o.textContent||o.value));if(opt){transportSelect.value=opt.value;transportSelect.dispatchEvent(new add=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a,input[type=submit],input[type=button]')].filter(visible).find(el=>/add|save|create|submit|itinerary|plan/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')));if(add) add.click();await sleep(900);const body=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');let stored='';try{for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){const k=localStorage.key(i);stored+=' '+k+' '+localStorage.getItem(k);}}catch(e){}const combined=body+' '+stored;const timeline=/timeline|itinerary|day|activity|transport|total/i.test(combined)&&(/Kyoto Station/.test(combined)&&/Temple walk/.test(combined));const transport=/taxi|walk|subway|plane/i.test(combined);return ok&&timeline&&transport&&body!==before&&!/undefined|nan|\[object object\]/i.test(body);})()

test_cases.name: Accessibility basics
Custom 12.5% tip on an 80 bill split by 4 updates total and per-person amounts

steps.expression: (async()=>{const fire=(el,t)=>el&&el.dispatchEvent(new Event(t,{bubbles:true}));const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=0&&r.height>=0;};const info=e=>((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+((e.closest('label,div,section,form')||e.parentElement||{}).innerText||'')).toLowerCase();const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')].filter(visible);const bill=inputs.find(e=>/bill|amount|total|账单|金额/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[0];const people=inputs.find(e=>/people|person|split|人数|guests/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[2]||inputs[1];const tipInput=inputs.find(e=>/custom|tip|percent|%|小费/i.test(info(e))&&e!==bill&&e!==people)||inputs.find(e=>e!==bill&&e!==people);if(!bill||!people||!tipInput)return false;bill.value='80';fire(bill,'input');fire(bill,'change');tipInput.value='12.5';fire(tipInput,'input');fire(tipInput,'change');people.value='4';fire(people,'input');fire(people,'change');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,450));const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/,/g,'');return /90(?:\.00)?\b/.test(text)&&/22\.5(?:0)?\b/.test(text)&&(/tip|total|person|each|per/i.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Bill, 25% tip, and 5-person split update exact totals and reset clears them

steps.expression: (async()=>{const fire=(el,t)=>el&&el.dispatchEvent(new Event(t,{bubbles:true}));const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')];const info=e=>((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.parentElement?.innerText||''));const bill=inputs.find(e=>/bill|amount/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[0];const people=inputs.find(e=>/people|person|split/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[2]||inputs[1];if(!bill||!people)return false;bill.value='250';fire(bill,'input');fire(bill,'change');const tipBtn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=button]')].find(b=>/25\s*%/.test(b.textContent||b.value||''));const tipInput=inputs.find(e=>/tip/i.test(info(e))&&e!==bill&&e!==people);if(tipBtn)tipBtn.click();else if(tipInput){tipInput.value='25';fire(tipInput,'input');fire(tipInput,'change');}people.value='5';fire(people,'input');fire(people,'change');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,400));const before=document.body.innerText.replace(/,/g,'');const reset=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=button]')].find(b=>/reset|clear/i.test(b.textContent||b.value||''));if(!/62\.5|62\.50/.test(before)||!/312\.5|312\.50/.test(before))return false;if(!reset)return false;reset.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));const after=document.body.innerText.replace(/,/g,'');return after!==before&&!/312\.5|312\.50/.test(after);})()

prompt: Create a mortgage calculator, single HTML file. Input: Total house price (10k CNY), Down payment ratio (slider 20%-80%), Loan term (dropdown: 10/15/20/25/30 years), Interest rate (default 4.2%, editable). Auto-calculate: Total loan amount, Monthly payment (Tab toggle between Equal Principal and Interest and Equal Principal methods), Total interest paid, Total repayment amount. Display repayment schedule (table: Period/Monthly Payment/Principal/Interest/Remaining) first 12 periods, expandable to view all. Pie chart: Principal vs Interest ratio. Line chart: Monthly principal and interest changes over time. All inputs linked for real-time calculation. Professional financial blue theme.

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__mortgageSet=(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const labelText=el=>Array.from(el.labels||[]).map(l=>l.innerText||'').join(' ');const meta=el=>[el.placeholder||'',el.name||'',el.id||'',el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',labelText(el)].join(' ').toLowerCase();const setVal=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();el.value=String(val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const inputs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input'));const numeric=inputs.filter(el=>!['range','hidden','checkbox','radio','button','submit'].includes((el.type||'text').toLowerCase()));const price=numeric.find(el=>/price|house|total|房屋|房价/.test(meta(el)))||numeric[0];const rate=numeric.find(el=>el!==price&&/rate|interest|利率/.test(meta(el)))||numeric.find(el=>el!==price);const range=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]')).find(el=>/down|首付/.test(meta(el)))||document.querySelector('input[type=range]');const term=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('select')).find(el=>/term|year|期限/.test(meta(el)))||document.querySelector('select');let ok=setVal(price,2000000)&&setVal(rate,4.2)&&setVal(range,30)&&!!term;if(term){const opts=Array.from(term.options||[]);const opt=opts.find(o=>String(o.value).trim()==='30')||opts.find(o=>/^\s*30\b/.test(o.textContent||''));if(opt){term.value=opt.value;term.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));term.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}else ok=false;}await sleep(500);return ok;})();return true;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Create a booking/reservation system in one HTML file. Calendar date picker to select date. Time slot grid (9am-5pm, 30-min slots) showing available (green) and booked (red) slots. Click available slot to start booking: name, email, phone, service type (dropdown), notes. Confirmation step with summary. Booked slots saved to localStorage and shown as unavailable on refresh. Cancel booking feature (enter booking ID). Admin toggle to view all bookings in a table. Send reminder simulation (button shows alert with booking details). Responsive design.

test_cases.name: Selecting a date changes the visible reservation date state or active calendar selection

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27d_date_before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); return true;})()

(()=>{const date=document.querySelector('input[type=date]'); if(!date) return false; date.value='2026-05-01'; date.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); date.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;})()
(()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); return t!==window.__r27d_date_before || /2026-05-01|May|05\//.test(t);})()

test_cases.name: Booking system exposes slots, booking fields, admin, cancel, and reminder controls

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase();const slots=(text.match(/\b(?:9|10|11|12|1|2|3|4|5)(?::00|:30)?\s*(?:am|pm)?\b/g)||[]).length>=8||document.querySelectorAll('button,td,[class*=slot]').length>=12;const availability=/available|booked/.test(text);const formText=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')].map(el=>[el.name,el.id,el.placeholder,el.getAttribute('aria-label')].join(' ').toLowerCase()).join(' ')+' '+text;const fields=['name','email','phone','service','notes'].filter(x=>formText.includes(x)).length>=4;const controls=['cancel','admin','reminder'].filter(x=>text.includes(x)).length>=3;const storage=/localstorage|saved|refresh|booking id|confirmation/.test(text);return slots&&availability&&fields&&controls&&storage&&!/\bundefined\b|\bnan\b|\[object object\]/i.test(text);})()

prompt: Create a note manager as a single HTML file. Add notes: title, content (support basic Markdown rendering: headers/bold/lists/code blocks), tags, color markers. Note list: two-column layout (left list, right detail/edit). Real-time Markdown preview (edit area and preview area side by side). Search: full-text search (title + content). Archive and recycle bin functionality. Pin notes. Word count statistics. Sort by modification time/creation time/title. Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+N for new, Ctrl+S for save. Data stored in localStorage. Dark theme, Notion-style.

test_cases.name: Creating two distinct notes lets title search isolate only the matching visible note card

steps.expression: (()=>{const title="RoundS11 Title Search Alpha"; const body="alpha-title-search-body-991"; const meta=el=>[el.placeholder||'',el.name||'',el.id||'',el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',el.className||'',el.labels&&el.labels[0]?el.labels[0].innerText:''].join(' ').toLowerCase(); const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;}; const fill=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false; el.focus(); if('value' in el) el.value=String(val); else el.textContent=String(val); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;}; const opener=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].find(el=>visible(el)&&/new note|new page|add note|create note|new/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||'').toLowerCase())); if(opener) opener.click(); const titleInput=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')].find(el=>visible(el)&&!/search/.test(meta(el))&&!/color|checkbox|radio|hidden/.test((el.type||'').toLowerCase())&&/title|name|untitled/.test(meta(el))) || [...document.querySelectorAll('input')].find(el=>visible(el)&&!/search/.test(meta(el))&&!/color|checkbox|radio|hidden/.test((el.type||'').toLowerCase())); const editor=[...document.querySelectorAll('textarea,[contenteditable="true"],[contenteditable=""]')].find(visible) || [...document.querySelectorAll('textarea')].find(visible); const ok1=fill(titleInput,title); const ok2=fill(editor,body); const save=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].find(el=>visible(el)&&/save|create|add/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||'').toLowerCase())); visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=0&&r.height>=0;};const setVal=(sel,val)=>{const el=document.querySelector(sel);if(!el)return false;if(el.isContentEditable){el.textContent=val;el.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,data:val}));}else{el.focus();el.value=val;el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}return true;};const label=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.placeholder||el.title||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(el.id||'')+' '+(el.className||'')).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const clickBy=re=>{const el=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button],input[type=button],input[type=submit]')].filter(visible).find(e=>re.test(label(e)));if(el){el.click();el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true}));return true;}return false;};const stored=()=>JSON.stringify(localStorage);const archivedStored=()=>{const s=stored();return s.includes(title)&&(s.includes('isArchived\\\":true')||s.includes('archived\\\":true')||s.includes('"isArchived":true')||s.includes('"archived":true'));};try{if(typeof app!=='undefined'&&app&&typeof app.createNewNote==='function'){app.createNewNote();await wait(150);setVal('#noteTitle,input[placeholder*=Title i],input[placeholder*=Untitled i]',title);if(typeof app.handleTitleChange==='function')app.handleTitleChange();setVal('#noteContent,textarea,[contenteditable=true]',content);if(typeof app.handleContentChange==='function')app.handleContentChange();if(typeof app.toggleArchive!=='function')return false;app.toggleArchive();await wait(180);const activeText=document.body.innerText||'';const activeGone=!activeText.includes(title)||/(^|\n)0\s*\n?notes/i.test(activeText);if(typeof app.setView==='function')app.setView('archive');await wait(180);const archiveText=document.body.innerText||'';return activeGone&&archiveText.includes(title)&&archivedStored();}if(typeof createNewNote==='function'){createNewNote();await wait(150);setVal('#noteTitle,input[placeholder*=Title i],input[placeholder*=Untitled i]',title);setVal('#noteContent,textarea,[contenteditable=true]',content);if(typeof saveCurrentNote==='function')saveCurrentNote();else if(typeof saveNote==='function')saveNote();if(typeof archiveNote==='function')archiveNote();else if(typeof toggleArchive==='function')toggleArchive();else if(!clickBy(/archive|archived/i))return false;await wait(180);const select=document.querySelector('select');if(select){const opt=[...select.options].find(o=>/archive|archived/i.test(o.textContent+' '+o.value));if(opt){select.value=opt.value;select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}}else{clickBy(/archive|archived/i);}await wait(180);const text=document.body.innerText||'';return text.includes(title)&&archivedStored();}return false;}catch(e){return false;}}

prompt: Create an Agile Sprint Kanban board, single HTML file. Sprint configuration: name, start/end date, goal. User story cards: title, description, story points (1/2/3/5/8/13), assignee, subtask checklist (checkbox completion). Columns: Backlog/Sprint/In Progress/Testing/Done. Burndown chart (SVG): X-axis as Sprint days, Y-axis as remaining story points, ideal line (straight line) and actual line (polyline). Daily stand-up view: display what each person did yesterday/what they will do today/blockers. Velocity trend (bar chart of completed points for the last 3 Sprints). Drag-and-drop cards, WIP limit (max 5 in In Progress, warning if exceeded). Data stored in localStorage.

test_cases.name: 故事点
Sprint burndown or velocity chart grounded

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const sprint=/sprint/.test(t); const workflow=/(backlog|in progress|testing|done)/.test(t); const points=/(point|pts|remaining|velocity)/.test(t); const burndown=/(burndown|ideal|actual|velocity|remaining)/.test(t); const chart=document.querySelectorAll('svg,canvas,path,polyline,rect,circle').length>=1; return sprint&&workflow&&points&&burndown&&chart;})()

prompt: Create an advanced multi-functional timer in a single HTML file. Features: (1) Pomodoro: configurable work/break durations, auto-switching, long break cycle (every 4). (4) HIIT interval training: configure exercise/rest seconds and sets, voice (TTS) counting. Switch functions via top Tabs. Statistics panel: today's focus time, weekly trend chart (SVG), longest consecutive Pomodoro record. Theme toggle (light/dark). All data stored in localStorage.

prompt: Build an admin dashboard with CRUD operations in one HTML file. Sidebar: Users, Products, Orders, Settings (tabs switch main content). Users tab: data table with 8 users, columns: ID, Name, Email, Role, Status, Actions (Edit/Delete). Add User button opens a modal form (name, email, role dropdown, status toggle). Edit button fills modal with existing data. Delete shows confirmation dialog. Search and role filter dropdown. Pagination (3 per page). Sort by clicking column headers. Dark theme.

test_cases.name: Sidebar nav
Hover button shows pointer cursor

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

prompt: Create an order management admin panel in one HTML file. Sidebar: Dashboard, Orders, Customers, Products, Settings. Orders tab: data table (Order ID, Customer, Items, Total, Status: pending/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled, Date). Status-based color coding. Order detail modal: item breakdown, shipping info, status update dropdown, add internal note. Bulk status update (select multiple + action). Advanced filters: date range, status, amount range. Export CSV. Real-time: new orders animate in every 30s (simulated). Responsive. Dark professional theme.

prompt: Create a data analytics admin panel as a single HTML file. Sidebar: Overview/Data Sources/Reports/Alerts/Settings. Overview page: 4 KPI cards (DAU/MAU/Conversion Rate/Revenue) with mini trend lines. Data source management: CRUD data connections (name/type: MySQL/PostgreSQL/API/CSV, status: normal/error, last sync time). Reports page: create report (drag to select dimensions and metrics), existing report list, click to view chart (SVG bar chart/line chart). Alerts: configure thresholds (metric > threshold triggers alert), alert list (triggered/resolved). Logs: operation audit table (time/operator/action/object). Data stored in localStorage. Blue tech-style theme.

prompt: Build a settings and configuration admin panel in one HTML file. Sidebar sections: General, Appearance, Security, Notifications, API Keys, Backup. General: site name, description, language selector, timezone dropdown. Appearance: theme switcher (light/dark/auto with live preview), primary color picker, logo upload placeholder, font size slider. Security: password requirements toggles (min length, uppercase, special chars), 2FA toggle, session timeout slider, IP whitelist CRUD. Notifications: email/push/SMS toggles per event type (sign up, order, error). API Keys: generate new key (random string display), list existing keys with created date and revoke button. Backup: last backup timestamp, backup now button (simulates with progress bar), restore from file input. All settings saved to localStorage. Changes show unsaved indicator, Save button at bottom of each section.

test_cases.name: Sidebar sections
Settings sidebar lists General, Appearance, Security, Notifications, API Keys, and Backup

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return ['general','appearance','security','notifications','api keys','backup'].every(x=>text.includes(x));})()

test_cases.name: Appearance section exposes theme, color, logo, and font-size controls together

steps.expression: (()=>{const link=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/appearance/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!link) return false; link.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const color=document.querySelectorAll('input[type=color]').length>=1; const range=document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]').length>=1; return /light|dark|auto/.test(text) && /logo/.test(text) && color && range;})()

test_cases.name: Theme mode changes the live appearance state instead of remaining static

steps.expression: (()=>{const body=document.body; window.__r26_theme_before=(body.className||'')+'|'+(body.getAttribute('data-theme')||'')+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).backgroundColor; return true;})()

(()=>{const tab=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/appearance/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(tab) tab.click(); const ctl=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],label,option')].find(el=>/dark|auto|light/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!ctl) return false; ctl.click(); return true;})()
(()=>{const body=document.body; const now=(body.className||'')+'|'+(body.getAttribute('data-theme')||'')+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).backgroundColor; return now!==window.__r26_theme_before;})()

test_cases.name: Changing a security toggle creates an unsaved or changed-settings state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_unsaved_before=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return true;})()

(()=>{const tab=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/security/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(tab) tab.click(); const ctl=document.querySelector('input[type=checkbox], [role=switch], [aria-checked]'); if(!ctl) return false; if(ctl.click) ctl.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return text!==window.__r26_unsaved_before && (/unsaved|save changes|save/i.test(text) || document.querySelectorAll('button:enabled').length>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Backup Now starts a visible progress or completion state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_backup_before=(document.body.innerText||''); return true;})()

(()=>{const tab=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/backup/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(tab) tab.click(); const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].find(el=>/backup now|start backup|backup/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!btn) return false; btn.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||''); const progress=document.querySelectorAll('progress, [role=progressbar]').length>=1; return text!==window.__r26_backup_before && (progress || /%|complete|completed|success/i.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Saving changed settings writes non-empty configuration into localStorage

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_admin_ls_before=JSON.stringify({...localStorage}); return true;})()

(()=>{const toggle=document.querySelector('input[type=checkbox], [role=switch], [aria-checked]'); if(toggle&&toggle.click) toggle.click(); const save=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].find(el=>/save/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!save) return false; save.click(); return true;})()
(()=>{const now=JSON.stringify({...localStorage}); return now!==window.__r26_admin_ls_before && now.length>2;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){const v=localStorage.getItem(localStorage.key(i));if(v&&v.length>2)return true;}return false;})()

prompt: Create a modal dialog component in one HTML file. A 'Open Modal' button triggers a centered modal overlay. Modal has: title, body text, 'Close' button and X icon in top-right. Clicking overlay background also closes. Smooth fade-in animation. Escape key closes. Focus trapped inside modal when open. Dark semi-transparent backdrop.

prompt: Create a confirmation dialog component as a single HTML file. When the 'Delete Item' button is clicked, open a confirmation dialog with the title 'Confirm Deletion', body text 'This action cannot be undone. Do you wish to continue?', and two buttons: 'Cancel' and 'Confirm Delete' (red). The Cancel button closes the dialog, while the Confirm button displays a success notification. Include a backdrop overlay, support for closing with the ESC key, and a fade-in animation.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a multi-purpose modal system in one HTML file. Demos: (1) Form modal: 'Add Item' button opens modal with name/description/category form, submit validates and adds to a list below. (2) Image lightbox: 6 thumbnail placeholders, click opens full-size in modal with prev/next navigation and counter (2/6). (3) Confirmation modal with custom actions. All modals: backdrop click close, Escape close, focus trap, scroll lock on body, stacked z-index if nested. Keyboard navigation: Tab cycles through focusable elements inside modal. Animated transitions (scale + fade). Accessible: role=dialog, aria-modal, aria-labelledby.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a bottom sheet component in a single HTML file. Three demos: (1) Action Menu: Click button to slide up action list from bottom (Share/Favorite/Report/Cancel), close by selecting option or clicking overlay. (2) Filter Panel: Bottom popup panel at half-screen height, containing multiple filter criteria (checkboxes + sliders + dropdowns), with confirm and reset buttons. (3) Detail Preview: Bottom popup panel with draggable height (drag handle, expandable to full screen), displaying content details. All sheets support: gesture close (drag down), overlay close, spring animation. Top rounded corners.

prompt: Build a modal dialog system with wizard flow in one HTML file. A 'Setup Wizard' button launches a 5-step modal wizard: Step 1: Welcome (just text + Next). Step 2: Form (3 fields + validation). Step 3: Preferences (toggles + dropdown). Step 4: Review (shows all entered data). Step 5: Complete (success animation + confetti CSS effect). Progress dots at top of modal. Back/Next/Skip/Finish buttons per step. Can't advance Step 2 without valid data. Modal has: close confirmation ('You have unsaved changes, leave?'), keyboard shortcuts (Enter=Next, Esc=close prompt), drag to reposition modal (draggable title bar), resize modal (corner drag handle), minimize button (shrinks to corner chip, click to restore). All state preserved during minimize. Responsive: full-screen on mobile. Dark theme with gradient accent.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["setup wizard", "required", "unsaved", "changes", "error", "leave"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "body", "gte": 6}, {"selector": "input, textarea, select", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

prompt: Create a dropdown menu component in one HTML file. A button 'Select Option' that toggles a dropdown list of 6 options. Click an option to select it (button text updates). Click outside closes dropdown. Hover highlights option. Selected option has checkmark. Clean minimal style with border and shadow.

test_cases.name: Selecting an option updates the trigger and remains marked when the dropdown reopens

steps.expression: async()=>{const wait=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=s=>(''+(s||'')).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const clean=s=>norm(s).replace(/[✓✔]/g,'').trim();const trigger=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button]')].filter(visible).find(el=>/select option|select|option/i.test(norm(el.innerText||el.textContent)+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')))||[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button]')].filter(visible)[0];if(!trigger)return false;const initial=norm(trigger.innerText||trigger.textContent);if(!/select/i.test(initial))return false;trigger.click();await wait(300);const collect=()=>{const out=[];const seen=new Set();for(const el of [...document.querySelectorAll('li,[role=option],[role=menuitem],button,a,div')].filter(visible)){if(el===trigger||trigger.contains(el))continue;const t=clean(el.innerText||el.textContent);if(!t||t===clean(initial)||t.length>80)continue;if(!/option|choice|item|alpha|one|two|three|four|five|six|1|2|3|4|5|6/i.test(t))continue;const key=t.toLowerCase();if(seen.has(key))continue;seen.add(key);out.push({el,t});}return out;};let opts=collect();if(opts.length<6)return false;const chosen=opts[1]||opts[0];chosen.el.click();await wait(350);const after=norm(trigger.innerText||trigger.textContent);if(after===initial)return false;const labelUpdated=after.toLowerCase().includes(chosen.t.toLowerCase())||chosen.t.toLowerCase().includes(after.toLowerCase())||/option|choice|item|one|two|three|1|2|3/i.test(after);if(!labelUpdated)return false;trigger.click();await wait(300);const reopened=collect();const selectedRow=reopened.find(o=>o.t.toLowerCase()===chosen.t.toLowerCase()||o.t.toLowerCase().includes(chosen.t.toLowerCase())||chosen.t.toLowerCase().includes(o.t.toLowerCase()));const selectedState=selectedRow&&([selectedRow.el,...selectedRow.el.querySelectorAll('*')].some(n=>n.getAttribute('aria-selected')==='true'||n.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true'||/selected|active|checked|current/i.test(n.className||''))||/[✓✔]/.test(selectedRow.el.innerText||selectedRow.el.textContent||''));const pageCheck=/[✓✔]/.test(document.body.innerText||'');return !!(selectedRow&&(selectedState||pageCheck));}

prompt: Build a searchable multi-select dropdown in one HTML file. A dropdown that allows selecting multiple options from a list of 20 items. Features: search/filter input at top of dropdown, select all/deselect all buttons, selected items shown as removable tags above the input, selected count badge, keyboard navigation (arrow keys to move, Enter to select, Escape to close). Options grouped by category (3 groups). Disabled options (2 grayed out). Max selection limit of 5 (shows warning). Clear all button.

prompt: Create a context menu (right-click menu) component in one HTML file. Right-click anywhere on the page to show a custom context menu. Menu items: Cut, Copy, Paste (with keyboard shortcut labels), divider line, Select All, divider, Properties. Hover highlights item. Click item shows a toast notification of the action. Sub-menu on 'Properties' (opens to the right with 3 sub-items). Menu auto-positions to stay within viewport. Disappears on click elsewhere or Escape. Disable browser default context menu.

prompt: Build a command palette (Cmd+K style) in one HTML file. Press Ctrl+K or click a search icon to open a centered overlay with search input. Type to filter commands from a list of 30+ items grouped by category (Navigation, Actions, Settings, Help). Each item: icon emoji, label, keyboard shortcut. Arrow keys navigate, Enter executes (shows toast notification), Escape closes. Recent commands section (last 5 used, persisted in localStorage). Fuzzy search (matches anywhere in label). Loading state when filtering. Pinned commands section. Result count. Empty state message. Dark overlay with blur backdrop. Responsive.

test_cases.name: JS validation checks prompt-grounded structure instead of a malformed or vacuous selector

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["3-4"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "details", "gte": 6}, {"selector": "[role=tab], button", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const input=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=search],input[placeholder],input[type=text]')].filter(visible)[0];if(input){input.value='r16'; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;}return false;})()
(()=>{const after=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return after!==window.__r16_before_text;})()

test_cases.name: Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_responsive_check]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["3-4"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a settings page with grouped accordion sections in one HTML file. 6 settings groups: Profile, Notifications, Privacy, Appearance, Language, Advanced. Each group expands to show 3-5 setting items. Setting types: toggle switches, dropdowns, radio buttons, text inputs, range sliders. Changes auto-save (localStorage) with 'Saved' toast notification. Reset to defaults button per group. Search settings: type to filter visible settings. Current values shown next to collapsed group headers. Unsaved changes indicator. Dark theme with toggle to light.

prompt: Build a dynamic tab manager in one HTML file. Features: add new tabs (+ button, prompts for name), close tabs (X on each tab), drag-reorder tabs, double-click tab to rename. Tabs overflow: horizontal scroll with arrow buttons when >6 tabs. Each tab content is a simple text editor (textarea). Tab right-click context menu: Rename, Duplicate, Close, Close Others. Pinned tabs (star icon, pinned tabs can't be closed and stay left). Tab state persisted in localStorage. Active tab indicator. Keyboard: Ctrl+T new tab, Ctrl+W close, Ctrl+Tab switch. Maximum 15 tabs (warning on exceed). Chrome-style tab bar appearance.

Infinite loop. Bottom pagination (1/6). Even card spacing. Smooth transition animations. Responsive: display only 1 card on mobile devices.

prompt: Build a testimonial carousel with fade transition in one HTML file. 5 testimonials, each: quote text, author name, author title, star rating (1-5), avatar placeholder. Fade transition (not slide). Auto-rotate every 6 seconds. Pause on hover. Navigation: prev/next arrows + dots. Keyboard: left/right arrows. Swipe gesture support (drag left/right). Progress bar showing time until next slide. Dark background, centered layout.

prompt: Create a full-screen Hero carousel in a single HTML file. 5 full-screen slides with different gradient background colors. Each slide: large headline + subtitle + CTA button. Parallax effect (text and background at different speeds). Transition effects: alternating between slide/fade/zoom. Thumbnail navigation bar at the bottom (5 small preview blocks with current highlight). Auto-play 8 seconds per slide + pause button. Keyboard left/right arrow navigation. Touch swipe support. Loading progress bar. Responsive text sizing.

test_cases.name: Autoplay advances the slide and updates the progress state

prompt: Create a 3D carousel with coverflow effect in one HTML file. 7 items arranged in a 3D arc (CSS perspective + translateZ + rotateY). Center item is largest and facing forward, items to the sides are rotated and recede. Click side items or use arrows to rotate. Mouse drag rotates carousel. Each item: image placeholder, title below. Reflection effect below items (CSS transform scaleY(-1) + gradient mask). Auto-rotate toggle. Speed control slider. Infinite loop. Keyboard navigation. Touch swipe. Responsive: flattens to horizontal scroll on mobile. Dark background with spotlight effect on center item.

prompt: Build a before/after comparison slider in one HTML file. 3 demo comparisons stacked vertically. Each: two images (gradient placeholders, different colors representing before/after) overlaid, with a vertical draggable divider line with a handle. Drag handle left/right reveals more of one side. Label badges 'Before' and 'After' on respective sides. Orientation toggle: horizontal or vertical split. Auto-animate button (slider moves back and forth). Touch support. Side-by-side mode toggle (removes slider, shows both images next to each other). Zoom: scroll to zoom into comparison area. Full-screen button per comparison. Responsive. Accessible: keyboard arrow keys move slider.

prompt: Create a toast notification component as a single HTML file. Implement three types: success, error, and loading. Success: display a green checkmark with message, auto-dismiss after 2 seconds. Error: display a red X mark with message, requires manual closing. Loading: display a spinning icon with message, transforms to success after 3 seconds. Notifications should slide in from the top and be center-aligned.

prompt: Build a notification center in one HTML file. Bell icon with unread count badge in header. Click bell: dropdown panel shows notification list (8 pre-loaded: 3 unread bold, 5 read). Each notification: icon, title, message preview, timestamp. Click notification marks as read (unbolds, decrements badge). 'Mark all as read' button. Clear all button. Group by today/yesterday/older. Notification types: message (blue), alert (red), update (green), system (gray). Push simulation: 'Simulate New' button adds a notification with slide-in toast preview. Persistent in localStorage.

prompt: Create an advanced toast system with actions in one HTML file. Toast types: (1) Simple: text + auto-dismiss. (2) With action: 'File deleted. Undo?' with Undo button (click restores, shows 'Restored' toast). (3) Persistent: stays until manually closed, for critical alerts. (4) With progress: shows upload progress 0-100% over 3 seconds, then 'Complete'. (5) Multi-line: title + description + 'Learn More' link. Position selector: top-right/top-left/bottom-right/bottom-left/top-center/bottom-center (6 radio buttons). Limit: max 5 toasts visible (oldest removed). Animation: configurable slide/fade toggle. Sound toggle (click sound via Web Audio). History: last 20 toasts in a collapsible log. Demo buttons for each type.

prompt: Create an enterprise-grade notification system in a single HTML file. Notification channels: In-page Toast, Notification Center, and Desktop notification simulation (bottom-right popup). Toast: 8 presets including Success, Error, Warning, Info, Loading, Confirm Dialog, Custom HTML, and With Progress Bar. Notification Center: Right-side drawer with grouping (Today/Yesterday/Earlier). Each entry displays icon, title, content, timestamp, and read status. Supports delete, mark all as read, and filter by type. Desktop notification: Bottom-right card showing title, body, and action buttons. Auto-collapses after 5 seconds but remains accessible (click to expand). Notification rules: Configurable via settings panel to determine which types trigger which channels. Do Not Disturb mode toggle (silences all notifications, stores only in Notification Center). Sound toggle (Web Audio notification sounds). Full localStorage persistence. Simulation: Auto-generates random notification every 15 seconds. Statistics: Shows count of today's received and unread notifications. Dark enterprise theme.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a data table with pagination and search in one HTML file. 50 rows of product data (pre-populated). Columns: ID, Name, Category, Price, Stock, Status (in stock/low/out). Features: search filters by name, column sorting, pagination (10 per page), rows per page selector (10/25/50). Status uses colored badges. Select rows with checkboxes for bulk delete. Export as CSV button. Column visibility toggles.

test_cases.name: Page renders
Column sort reorders visible product rows instead of only rendering table headers

steps.expression: (async()=>{const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&+s.opacity!==0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0};const rows=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr,table tr,[role=row]')].filter(visible).map(r=>(r.innerText||r.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim()).filter(t=>/\d/.test(t)&&t.length>8);const before=rows();if(before.length<5)return false;const header=[...document.querySelectorAll('th,button,[role=columnheader],[role=button]')].filter(visible).find(e=>/price|stock|name|rating|inventory|价格|库存/i.test(e.innerText||e.textContent||''));if(!header)return false;header.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500));const after=rows();return after.length>=5&&before[0]!==after[0]&&!/nan|undefined|\[object object\]/i.test((document.body.innerText||''));})()

test_cases.name: Search narrows the visible row set and keeps the query reflected in table state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27_table_rows_before=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const first=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr td:nth-child(2), table tr td:nth-child(2), [role=row] [role=gridcell]:nth-child(2)')].map(el=>(el.innerText||'').trim()).find(Boolean)||'Product';window.__r27_table_query=first.split(/\s+/).slice(0,1).join(' ');return true;})()

(()=>{const input=document.querySelector('input[type=search], input[placeholder*=search i], input[type=text]'); if(!input) return false; input.value=window.__r27_table_query; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;})()

(()=>{const rows=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const text=(document.body.innerText||'');return rows<=window.__r27_table_rows_before && text.toLowerCase().includes(String(window.__r27_table_query||'').toLowerCase());})()

test_cases.name: Sorting changes the first visible row order rather than only toggling an icon

steps.expression: (()=>{const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');window.__r27_sort_before=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return true;})()

(()=>{const header=[...document.querySelectorAll('th,[role=columnheader],button')].find(el=>/price|stock|name/i.test(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')); if(!header) return false; header.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');const after=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return !!after && after!==window.__r27_sort_before;})()

test_cases.name: Pagination or rows-per-page changes the visible row count or the first visible page item

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27_page_rows_before=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');window.__r27_page_first=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return true;})()

(()=>{const select=document.querySelector('select'); if(select && select.options.length>1){select.selectedIndex=Math.min(1,select.options.length-1); select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;} const next=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button]')].find(el=>/next|>|page/i.test(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')); if(!next) return false; next.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const rows=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');const first=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return rows!==window.__r27_page_rows_before || first!==window.__r27_page_first;})()

prompt: Create an editable data table in a single HTML file. Include 20 rows of student grade data (Name/Chinese/Math/English/Total/Rank). Double-click any cell to edit it directly (transforms into an input field). Automatically calculate total scores and rankings. Apply conditional formatting: green for scores >=90, normal for 60-89, red for <60. Include Add Row and Delete Row buttons. Sorting: click column headers. Filtering: dropdown by class. Statistics row: display average scores at the bottom. Store data in localStorage.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a responsive data table with inline actions in one HTML file. 15 rows of task data: Task, Assignee, Priority (High/Medium/Low badges), Due Date, Status (dropdown: To Do/In Progress/Done). Inline editing: click cell to edit. Row actions: edit button opens edit mode, delete with confirm, duplicate. Drag to reorder rows. Column resizing (drag column border). Fixed header on scroll. Row expansion (click arrow to show subtask details). Mobile: card layout instead of table.

prompt: Build a spreadsheet-like data grid in one HTML file. 100 rows x 8 columns of financial data. Features: virtual scrolling (only render visible rows for performance), multi-cell selection (click+drag), copy/paste (Ctrl+C/V), formula bar (select cell to see/edit value in top bar), cell formatting (bold/italic/number format), freeze first column and header, column resize, auto-fill (drag cell corner to fill series), undo/redo (Ctrl+Z/Y), find & replace dialog (Ctrl+F). Cell types: text, number (right-aligned), date, currency (auto-format $). Conditional formatting: top 10 values green, bottom 10 red. Export to CSV. Summary bar at bottom: SUM, AVG, COUNT of selected cells. Dark Excel-style theme.

prompt: Create a pivot table component in a single HTML file. Data: 100 sales records (Date/Product/Region/Salesperson/Amount/Quantity). Pivot configuration: Drag fields to Row/Column/Value/Filter areas. Row fields: Product or Region. Column fields: Month. Values: Amount (toggle between Sum/Average/Count). Cross-tabulation with subtotal rows and columns. Expand/Collapse row groups. Conditional formatting: Color scale for values (Low=White, High=Dark Blue). Export to Excel button (CSV). Chart linkage: Selecting rows automatically displays corresponding bar chart on the right (SVG). Filters: Multi-select dropdowns (select which products/regions). Search functionality. Dark data analysis theme.

prompt: Create a 3-step form in one HTML file. Step indicator at top (circles: 1-2-3 connected by lines, current highlighted). Step 1: Name and Email inputs. Clean blue theme.

prompt: Build a 4-step checkout form in one HTML file. Steps: Shipping, Payment, Review, Confirmation. Shipping: name, address, city, state dropdown, zip, phone. Payment: card number (auto-format with spaces every 4 digits), expiry (MM/YY auto-format), CVV (3 digits, masked), cardholder name. Review: order summary table (3 items with quantities and prices), shipping address display, payment last-4-digits. Confirmation: animated checkmark, order number, estimated delivery. Progress bar. Input validation per step. Summary sidebar always visible on desktop.

prompt: Create a 5-step survey form in a single HTML file. Steps: Basic Information / Work Status / Lifestyle Habits / Satisfaction Rating / Submission Confirmation. Progress: Top percentage progress bar (20%→40%→60%→80%→100%). Question types: Radio buttons / Checkboxes / Dropdown / Rating (1-5 star click) / Text input / Range slider (1-10). 3-5 questions per step. Required field indicators. Validation: Alerts for unanswered required fields. Previous/Next navigation. Final step: Preview all answers (clickable to edit and jump back to corresponding step). After submission: Thank you page + statistics (Your satisfaction ranks in the top X% of all users, simulated data). Warm and friendly color scheme.

test_cases.name: Fill first required control then Next advances and progress updates

steps.expression: (()=>{const el=[...document.querySelectorAll("input, select, textarea")].find(x=>!x.disabled&&getComputedStyle(x).display!=="none"); if(!el) return false; if(el.tagName==="SELECT") { el.selectedIndex=Math.min(1, el.options.length-1); el.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); return true; } if(el.type==="checkbox"||el.type==="radio") { el.click(); return true; } el.value=el.type==="range"?String(Number(el.min||0)+1):"filled"; el.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); return true;})()
(()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||"").toLowerCase();return /step|progress|%/.test(t);})()

prompt: Create a dynamic form builder with stepper preview in one HTML file. Two panels: Left: form builder (drag-and-drop field types: text, email, phone, dropdown, checkbox, radio, date, file upload, rating, signature pad). Right: live preview as multi-step form. Builder features: reorder fields by drag, set field as required toggle, add placeholder text, group fields into steps (drag divider lines), conditional logic (show field B only if field A = specific value), field validation rules (regex pattern input). Preview: renders the built form as a stepper with all configured steps, validation working. Export form config as JSON. Import from JSON. 3 pre-built templates (Contact Form, Job Application, Event Registration). Responsive. Dark builder theme.

prompt: Create an intelligent form engine within a single HTML file. JSON-driven configuration: the form structure is defined by a built-in JSON configuration (3 steps, 4-6 fields per step). Field types include: text, number, email, phone, date, time, dropdown (cascading: province→city→district), multi-select, file upload placeholder, signature pad (canvas handwriting), address autocomplete simulation, and simple rich text editor. Conditional logic: show/hide related fields based on specific selections (e.g., display company information fields when "enterprise user" is selected). Validation: real-time validation plus submit validation, custom regex rules, password strength indicator, and phone number format validation. Auto-save functionality (save to localStorage every 30 seconds with recovery prompt). Multi-language support: Chinese/English toggle button. Dark/Light theme switch. Form analytics: circular progress chart for completion status, time spent statistics per step. After submission: display data in both JSON and table formats. Print form button.
