prompt: Build a tax filing wizard form in one HTML file. 6 steps: Personal Info, Income (multiple income sources: add/remove rows for employer/freelance/investment), Deductions (categorized checkboxes with amounts: mortgage, student loan, charity, medical), Credits (child tax credit calculator based on number of children, education credits), Review (full summary with calculated totals, editable inline), File (simulated submission with progress). Tax calculation engine: gross income - deductions = taxable income, apply brackets (10%/12%/22%/24%/32%/35%/37%), subtract credits = tax owed or refund. Compare to withheld amount. Show effective tax rate. Visualization: income breakdown pie chart, tax bracket bar chart. Save/load progress (localStorage). Print tax summary. Help tooltips on every field. Responsive. Professional blue-gray theme.

prompt: Create a chat interface in one HTML file. Message area showing 3 pre-loaded messages (alternating You and Bot). User messages right-aligned blue bubbles, bot messages left-aligned gray bubbles. Timestamps below each. Input field at bottom with Send button. Type message and click Send (or Enter) adds it as user message, clears input, auto-scrolls. Simulated bot reply after 1 second. Responsive full-width on mobile.

prompt: Create a customer service chat widget as a single HTML file. Floating button in the bottom-right corner (circular with chat icon), clicking expands the chat window. Window components: Top header (agent name + green online status indicator + close button), message area (displaying 2 welcome messages), input field and send button. Auto-reply with fixed text 1 second after a message is sent. Close button collapses the window back to the floating button. Window should have shadow and rounded corners.

prompt: Build a messaging app interface in one HTML file. Left panel: contact list (8 contacts with avatar placeholder, name, last message preview, timestamp, unread badge). Right panel: chat area. Click contact loads that conversation (different pre-loaded messages per contact). Send messages. Message types: text, emoji picker (grid of 20 emojis, click inserts), image message (placeholder). Typing indicator animation (three dots bouncing). Read receipts (double checkmarks). Online/offline status. Search contacts. Message grouping by date. Delete message (right-click or long-press).

prompt: Create a group chat interface in a single HTML file. Group name: Project Team (5 members). Message area: messages from different members (different colored avatar circles + nickname + message bubbles + timestamps). Preload 10 conversations. Send message: text + @mentions (typing @ pops up a member list for selection). Message types: text / system messages (gray centered: "XX joined the group") / quote reply (long press a message to select reply, showing a thumbnail of the quoted original message). Group info panel: click the group name to expand (member list + group announcement + group file placeholders). Message search. New message reminder (when scrolled to the top, an "N new messages" button appears at the bottom; click to scroll to the bottom).

prompt: Create an AI chatbot interface in one HTML file. Clean centered chat layout. Bot avatar and name at top. Welcome message with 3 suggested quick reply buttons. User sends message, bot responds after 1.5s delay with typing indicator. Bot responses vary based on keywords (hardcoded: greeting→hello response, help→feature list, pricing→plan info, default→generic response). Message history scrollable. Markdown-lite in bot messages (bold with **, code with backticks rendered as styled spans). Feedback buttons per bot message (thumbs up/down). Clear conversation button. Export chat as text. Dark AI theme (dark bg, green accent).

Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a Slack-style messaging app in one HTML file. Sidebar: workspace name, channel list (5 channels with # prefix, unread counts), direct messages (4 people with online indicators), add channel button. Main area: channel header (name, topic, member count, search), message thread with timestamps grouped by date. Features: message composer with formatting toolbar (bold, italic, code, link, emoji, attachment placeholder), thread replies (click message to open thread sidebar), reactions (emoji reaction bar on hover, click to add, count display), pin messages, edit own messages, delete with confirm. @mentions autocomplete. Channel settings modal. Keyboard shortcuts. User status (online/away/DND with colored dot). Notification preferences per channel. Dark Slack-like theme. Responsive: sidebar collapses to hamburger on mobile.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a multi-functional chat room in a single HTML file. Features: (1) Multi-room: 3 chat rooms on the left (General/Tech/Random), switching loads different message histories. (2) Message types: Text/Code blocks (auto-formatted with ```)/Images (placeholder thumbnails, click to enlarge)/Files (display filename+size+download button)/Polls (create poll: title+2-4 options, others can vote, display real-time results bar chart). (3) User system: 5 simulated users (different avatar colors+nicknames), click avatar to view profile card. (4) Admin features: Admin badge, pin messages, mute user simulation, announcement publishing. (5) Real-time simulation: Auto-generate a random message from other users every 10 seconds. (6) Message history: Scroll up to load more (simulated pagination). (7) Emoji panel: 40 emojis categorized (Smileys/Gestures/Animals/Food). Data stored in localStorage. Dark Discord style.

prompt: Create a customer support live chat widget with agent dashboard in one HTML file. Two views toggled by a tab: Customer View and Agent View. Customer: floating chat button → opens widget → pre-chat form (name, email, issue category dropdown) → connected to agent → chat with typing indicator, file attachment placeholder, satisfaction rating at end. Agent: dashboard with queue (3 waiting chats), active chats panel (click to switch between 2 active conversations), canned responses dropdown (5 pre-written responses, click to insert), customer info sidebar (name, email, history), transfer to another agent button, close/resolve conversation. Both views: real-time message sync (simulated: messages appear in both views). Chat transcript export. SLA timer (response time tracking). Priority tags. Offline mode: when toggled, customer sees 'Leave a message' form instead of live chat.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["leave a message", "i need help", "customer", "agent"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "body", "gte": 4}, {"selector": "input", "gte": 2}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=2)&&(true);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const els=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a,[role=tab],label,summary,li,th,td,div')].filter(visible);const re=/general|tech|random|agent|customer|queue|active|channel|room|conversation/i;const target=els.find(el=>re.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').trim()))||els[0];if(target){target.click(); return true;}return false;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const field=[...document.querySelectorAll('textarea,input[type=text],input[placeholder]')].filter(visible)[0];if(field){field.focus(); field.value='r16 live message'; field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); field.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}const send=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].filter(visible).find(el=>/send|reply|post|message|chat|submit/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').trim()));if(send) send.click();else if(field){field.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter',bubbles:true}));}return true;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a simple Markdown editor in one HTML file. Split view: left textarea for Markdown input, right panel for rendered preview. Support: headings (#-###), bold (**text**), italic (*text*), links [text](url), unordered lists (- item), code blocks (```code```), images (![alt](url) as placeholder text). Real-time preview updates as you type. Toggle: edit only / preview only / split view. Default sample Markdown text pre-loaded. Clean minimal design.

test_cases.name: Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_responsive_check]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["hello world"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: ARIA roles present

steps.expression: document.querySelectorAll('[role], [aria-label], [aria-expanded], [aria-hidden]').length > 0

prompt: Build a rich text editor in one HTML file. Toolbar buttons: Bold (B), Italic (I), Underline (U), Strikethrough (S), heading (H1/H2/H3 dropdown), bullet list, numbered list, text alignment (left/center/right), text color (5 color swatches), link insert (prompt for URL), undo/redo. Editable area using contenteditable div. Toolbar buttons toggle active state when formatting is active. Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+B bold, Ctrl+I italic, Ctrl+U underline, Ctrl+Z undo. Word count and character count display below. Export as HTML button. Clear formatting button.

prompt: Create a code editor as a single HTML file. Features: code editing area (textarea/contenteditable), CSS syntax highlighting (blue keywords, green strings, gray comments, orange numbers), line numbers on the left, Tab key inserts 4 spaces (prevent default behavior), auto-indent (maintain indentation on new lines), auto-bracket completion (typing '(' auto-closes). Find and replace (Ctrl+F opens search box, highlight matches, replace button). Language selection dropdown (JavaScript/Python/HTML, switches highlighting rules). Font size +/- buttons. Theme: Dark Monokai style. Line count statistics.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a Notion-style block editor in one HTML file. Content is made of blocks. Block types: paragraph, heading (H1/H2/H3), bullet list, numbered list, to-do checkbox, code block, quote, divider, callout (colored box with icon), toggle (click to expand/collapse). Type '/' at start of empty block to open command palette for block type selection. Drag handle on left of each block for reorder. Click block to select, show floating toolbar (bold/italic/link/color). Multi-block selection with shift+click. Block actions menu (⋮): duplicate, delete, change type, move up/down. Undo/redo. Auto-save to localStorage. Slash commands searchable. Page title editable. Last saved timestamp. Export as Markdown. Dark theme with warm tones.

test_cases.name: Block actions menu can duplicate/delete/move and changes block structure

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__hd_actions_count=document.querySelectorAll('p,h1,h2,h3,li,blockquote,pre,code,[data-block],[class*=block]').length;const first=document.querySelector('[contenteditable],.block-wrapper,[data-block],[class*=block]');if(first)first.click();const menu=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],.menu-dots,.block-menu-btn,.block-actions')].find(e=>/⋮|more|actions|duplicate|delete|move/i.test((e.innerText||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.title||'')+' '+(e.className||'')));if(menu)menu.click();setTimeout(()=>{const act=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,li,[role=menuitem],.context-item,.ctx-item,div')].find(e=>/duplicate|delete|move up|move down|change type/i.test(e.innerText||''));if(act)act.click();},100);return !!menu;})()

(()=>{const count=document.querySelectorAll('p,h1,h2,h3,li,blockquote,pre,code,[data-block],[class*=block]').length;const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();return count!==window.__hd_actions_count||/duplicate|delete|move|change type/.test(text);})()

prompt: Create an online resume editor as a single HTML file. Left panel: editing interface (form-based editing for sections: Personal Info, Education, Work Experience, Skills, Projects). Right panel: real-time A4 resume preview (updates instantly with left-panel edits). Features: add/delete experience entries, drag-and-drop to reorder sections, switch between 3 resume templates (Classic/Modern/Minimal with different CSS styles), photo upload placeholder, draggable skill bars to adjust percentages, PDF export (via print dialog), custom color theme (primary color picker), auto-save to localStorage, Chinese/English language switch. Preview supports zoom (slider). When printing, only the preview area should be printed.

Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a collaborative whiteboard drawing tool in one HTML file. Canvas-based drawing surface. Tools: pen (freehand), line, rectangle, circle, eraser, text (click to add text box), select (click to select and move shapes). Color picker (12 colors + custom), brush size slider (1-20px), opacity slider. Layers panel: add/remove/reorder/toggle visibility/rename layers. Undo/redo (last 50 actions). Grid toggle. Snap to grid. Zoom (mouse wheel, 50%-400%) with pan (space+drag). Export as PNG. Save/load from localStorage. Keyboard shortcuts (B=brush, E=eraser, R=rect, C=circle, L=line, T=text, Ctrl+Z undo). Mini-map in corner. Shape properties panel (when selected: position, size, color, opacity). Dark toolbox UI, white canvas.

prompt: Create a spreadsheet formula editor in one HTML file. 20x10 grid of editable cells. Cell reference system (A1-J20). Formula bar: select cell shows its formula/value in top bar. Support formulas: =SUM(A1:A5), =AVG(B1:B3), =COUNT(C1:C10), =IF(A1>10,"Yes","No"), =A1+B1, =A1*2, basic arithmetic. Cell dependencies: changing a cell auto-recalculates dependent cells. Error display: #ERROR for invalid formulas, #REF for circular references. Cell formatting: bold toggle, text alignment, number format (2 decimal places), cell background color. Column resize (drag header border). Row/column insert/delete. Freeze panes (first row + first column always visible). Cell range selection (click+drag highlights range, shows SUM/AVG/COUNT in status bar). Copy/paste cells (Ctrl+C/V with formula adjustment). Named ranges. Conditional formatting: highlight cells > threshold value. Undo/redo. Export CSV. Auto-save. Dark Excel theme.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["20x10", "10,", "count", "yes", "sum", "avg"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()
